message:
test(fcp-core): add supplementary exactly-once semantics tests

Additional 29 unit tests providing complementary coverage for
exactly-once semantics (beyond the 60 tests in operation_golden_vectors.rs):

- Schema verification tests (fcp.operation:intent/receipt schema IDs)
- Signable bytes determinism golden vectors
- Idempotency store simulation tests
- Lease fencing and stale holder detection
- Orphan detection threshold tests
- Receipt-intent binding validation
- Safety tier idempotency class requirements
- Concurrency determinism tests

Adds golden vector files in tests/vectors/operation/:
- intent_with_key_and_lease.json
- intent_minimal.json
- receipt_with_outcomes.json
- idempotency_completed.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
